chunks.text:
All-In-One Electric — Full-service electrical contractor in Richardson. Services:
- Residential electrical
- Commercial electrical
- Electrical panel upgrades
- Lighting installation
- Ceiling fan installation
- Generator installation

Contact Information:
- Phone: (214) 878-0741
- Email: larry@allinoneelectric. com
- Address: 500 E Arapaho Rd #201, Richardson, TX 75081
- Website: https://www. allinoneelectric. com/
- Service Area: Richardson, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 4.
